summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Tenant Permissions system with role-based navigation and access control. All core features are working correctly. Backend tests passed 100% (12/12). Frontend navigation and settings sections are correctly filtered based on user role.
passed_tests: Registration always assigns 'customer' role (even if admin role is passed)
Super Admin navigation shows: Dashboard, Services (all), Service Management (all), My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, Admin Config (full), My Ratings, Support, Settings
Super Admin Settings shows: Profile, Security, Notifications, Preferences, Data Protection, Legal, About, System Configuration, API Keys
Customer navigation shows: Dashboard, Services (all), My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, My Ratings, Support, Settings
Customer navigation does NOT show: Admin Config, Service Management
Customer Settings shows: Profile, Security, Notifications, Preferences, Payment Methods, Data Protection, Legal, About
Customer Settings does NOT show: System Configuration, API Keys
Operator navigation shows: Dashboard, Services (assigned only), Service Management (assigned only), Team & Roles, Admin Config (limited), My Ratings, Support, Settings
Operator Admin Config shows only: All Bookings, Bills, Sales, Audit Log
Operator Admin Config does NOT show: Analytics, User Management, Operators, Employees, Commission, Permissions, Database, Validation
Operator Settings shows: Profile, Security, Notifications, Preferences, Data Protection, Legal, About
Operator Settings does NOT show: Payment Methods, System Configuration, API Keys
Analytics page consolidated - includes all DataAnalytics content (summary stats, trends charts, service performance)
DataAnalytics route (/admin/data-analytics) does NOT exist - redirects to dashboard
Browse Services for operators shows only assigned service types (hotel, restaurant for test operator)
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx correctly implements 3 distinct navigation sections: Customer, Operator, Admin/Super Admin
Settings.jsx correctly uses CUSTOMER_SETTINGS_SECTIONS for customers (includes Payment Methods) and OPERATOR_SETTINGS_SECTIONS for operators/admins (no Payment Methods)
Analytics.jsx successfully consolidates DataAnalytics content with summary stats, trend charts, and service performance sections
BrowseServices.jsx getVisibleServices function correctly filters services based on operator's assigned service_types
auth.py register function always assigns 'customer' role regardless of input

operator.note: Check 'I'm logging in as a service operator' checkbox

seed_data_creation: Created testcustomer@test.com (customer role) and testoperator@test.com (operator role with hotel/restaurant service types)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant permissions system is fully implemented and tested. Three user roles (Customer, Operator, Admin/Super Admin) have distinct navigation and settings sections. Analytics page now includes consolidated DataAnalytics content. DataAnalytics route has been removed. Test accounts created: testcustomer@test.com, testoperator@test.com (with operator checkbox on login).
mocked_data_note: Analytics data uses MOCK data if no real booking data exists in the database
